title: Admin Abuse
description: small Paper/Spigot plugin that lets admins send loud, colorful global announcements and meme-style ‚ÄúADMIN ABUSE‚Äù alerts with both chat messages and titles. It supports legacy & color codes and hex colors, includes a countdown command to hype events, and is
body:
# This plugin will not recieve anymore updates for a longwhile. Due to me being very busy in real life and having a job.
Admin-Abuse is a lightweight Paper/Spigot broadcast plugin focused on flashy ‚Äúadmin abuse‚Äù style announcements with full color support.‚Äã

Features
Simple commands for global announcements, including a dedicated ‚ÄúAdmin Abuse‚Äù countdown that hypes up events before they start.‚Äã

Supports legacy color codes (&a, &b, &l, etc.) and modern hex colors (like #ff00ff) in both chat and titles for highly customized messages.‚Äã‚Äã
-# it should also support minimessage format (i think)

Sends synchronized chat broadcasts and on-screen titles to all online players, making sure no one misses important messages.‚Äã

Commands

`/broadcast <message>` ‚Äì Sends a formatted global announcement with full color support.‚Äã

`/adminabuse <message>` ‚Äì Instantly blasts an ‚ÄúADMIN ABUSE‚Äù style alert to everyone.‚Äã

`/adminabusestart <message>` ‚Äì Starts a short countdown (3‚Ä¶2‚Ä¶1‚Ä¶) and then triggers an ‚ÄúADMIN ABUSE‚Äù broadcast.

`/chunkban <player>` Bans someone from the chunk.

`/chunkunban <player>` Unbans someone from the chunk.‚Äã‚Äã

Permissions
`eee.broadcast` ‚Äì Allows use of `/broadcast`.‚Äã

`eee.adminabuse` ‚Äì Allows use of `/adminabuse` and `/adminabusestart`.

`eee.chunkban` - Alows use of `/chunkban`.

`eee.chunkunban` - Alows use of `/chunkun~~~~ban`.‚Äã

Compatibility
Server: Spigot / Paper

Minecraft: 1.21+ (built and tested on modern Paper/Spigot APIs).‚Äã

Ideal for SMPs, event servers, and admin meme moments where you want announcements to look loud, colorful, and impossible to ignore.‚Äã
